title: thymus striatus subsp. ophioliticus
intro: Thymus striatus subsp. ophioliticus, also known as the ophiolitic thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The ophiolitic thyme is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
